What We Offer

Our Core Services

End-to-end timber import and supply — from certified origins to your factory floor.

Hardwood Supply

White Ash, Red Oak, Teak and Walnut in FAS and FAS/1F grades. 1″–3″ thicknesses sourced from NHLA-certified North American mills.

Learn more

Softwood & Lumber

S4S and rough-sawn Southern Yellow Pine (KDHT) in 2×4 through 2×12. Kiln dried, heat treated to ISPM-15, bundle tallied and container ready.

Learn more

Log Exports

Eastern White Pine and hardwood logs — graded, measured, containerised. Full phytosanitary certificates and documentation included with every shipment.

Learn more

Global Logistics

CIF/CFR to Karachi, Jebel Ali, Rotterdam and 50+ ports. We handle container booking, customs clearance, and all shipping documentation.

Learn more
15+
Years in Timber
Our Story

A Legacy Built on Exceptional Wood

Libra Timber has spent over 15 years connecting certified North American and South Asian timber origins to manufacturers and builders across the globe. Based in Lahore, Pakistan, we are the precision link between the world's finest forests and clients who refuse to compromise.

Our team personally oversees grading, kiln drying, and containerisation at source — so every shipment that carries our name meets the exacting standards your business depends on.

NHLA & NLGA Certified Grades

Every board is graded to international import standards at source.

7–14 Day Container Loading

From quote to loaded container in under two weeks on standard species.

50+ Destination Ports

CIF/CFR to Karachi, Dubai, Rotterdam, Shanghai and beyond.

Our Principles

What We Stand For

Five commitments we make on every shipment, to every client, without exception.

01

Uncompromising Quality

Every board is graded at source. Below-spec material never reaches the container.

02

Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. The CIF/CFR price we quote is exactly the price you pay.

03

Reliable Lead Times

We hold stock and maintain direct mill relationships to honour every commitment.

04

Certified Sourcing

Exclusively from mills with legal logging and grading certification. Full docs every time.

05

Dedicated Service

One contact from first inquiry to port arrival. Available around the clock for our clients globally.

Our Range

Premium Wood Species

From construction softwood to fine cabinet hardwood — we stock what the global market demands.

Bestseller

Southern Yellow Pine (S4S KDHT)

2″ lumber in 2×4 through 2×12. Grades #1–#4. Kiln dried and heat treated to ISPM-15.

KDHT · Softwood
Export Grade

Eastern White Pine Logs

Grades #1–#5, A–B Grade air dried. Ideal for furniture, millwork and construction markets.

AD · Pine Logs
Premium

White Ash Hardwood

FAS and FAS/1F grades. 1″, 1.5″ and 2″ thicknesses. Popular for flooring, furniture and sports equipment.

FAS · Hardwood
In Stock

Rough Southern Yellow Pine

Prime & Better and Merch grades. 2″ and 1″ thicknesses. SAP Prime available. Competitive pricing on full containers.

Rough Sawn
Available

Red Oak Hardwood

FAS grade Red Oak in standard and custom thicknesses. Rich open grain, excellent for fine joinery and flooring.

FAS · Hardwood

Need a custom species?

We source any grade, dimension, or exotic species on request from our mill network.

Enquire now
Why Libra Timber

The Libra Difference

What separates a great timber partner from just another supplier.

01

Mill-Direct Relationships

We buy directly from certified North American mills — eliminating middlemen and passing the savings on to you.

02

Grade Guaranteed

Every shipment ships with a signed grade certificate. If timber arrives off-grade, we resolve it at our cost.

03

One Point of Contact

Your dedicated account manager handles every step from quote to port arrival. One call resolves any question.

04

Complete Documentation

Phytosanitary cert, ISPM-15 heat treatment cert, bill of lading, fumigation report — all prepared ahead of vessel arrival.

Ready to order?
Let's talk timber.
